ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: WHILE THERE ARE NO DEADLINES ON GENERAL GRANT APPLICATIONS, LARGER GRANTS ARE TYPICALLY APPROVED AT BOARD MEETINGS TAKING PLACE IN JANUARY, APRIL, JULY AND OCTOBER. DEPENDING ON THE TIMING OF SUBMISSION OF A GRANT APPLICATION, IT COULD TAKE AS LONG AS THREE MONTHS FOR GRANT APPROVAL. APPLICANTS MAY OBTAIN INFORMATION NEEDED TO APPLY FOR A GRANT AT OUR WEBSITE: WWW.FRISTFOUNDATION.ORG.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.SubmissionDeadlinesTxt: GENERAL GRANTS ARE GIVEN THROUGHOUT THE YEAR. THERE ARE NO DEADLINES ON GENERAL GRANT APPLICATIONS.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: FOR LEGAL REASONS, THE FOUNDATION DOES NOT SUPPORT INDIVIDUALS OR THEIR PROJECTS, PRIVATE FOUNDATIONS, POLITICAL ACTIVITIES, ADVERTISING OR SPONSORSHIPS. AS A MATTER OF POLICY, THE FOUNDATION DOES NOT ORDINARILY SUPPORT: *OPERATIONAL OR PROGRAMMATIC EXPENSES, INCLUDING SALARIES. *ENDOWMENT OR SCHOLARSHIP FUNDING. *EVENT SPONSORSHIPS. *INDIVIDUAL SCHOOLS. *HOSPITALS OR NURSING HOMES. *RELIGIOUS ORGANIZATIONS FOR RELIGIOUS PURPOSES. *STATEWIDE INITIATIVES.

GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: THE FOUNDATION DISTRIBUTED $2,500 TO A DONOR-ADVISED FUND AT THE COMMUNITY FOUNDATION OF SOUTH CENTRAL KENTUCKY OVER WHICH A FOUNDATION DIRECTOR HAS ADVISORY PRIVILEGES. THIS DISTRIBUTION WAS TREATED AS A QUALIFYING DISTRIBUTION AND WAS MADE PURSUANT TO THE FOUNDATION'S BOARD DIRECTED GIFT PROGRAM FOR ITS OFFICERS AND DIRECTORS.
